title: Responsible Conduct of Research — New Faculty Development Seminar Slides (Isuk)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-11-14 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Responsible Conduct of Research' presented by Edet Isuk, PhD. New-faculty-targeted RCR primer that complements the longer-form Responsible Conduct of Research training (form_rcr_powerpoint) on the compliance side. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/miNVpB5VcD8CQOy4tR2UfoDWfUnksdEytMLJ0Byyy9bcKC3iPWlxbEEuroBDlEYu.cSBIfRq24VAYA0dg
